song.title: Feel Alive
song.keywords: EDM anthem, dance music, feel alive, good vibes, love song, positive energy, dance pop
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Feel Alive' from Lyrics by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Feel Alive Lyrics - Agust Islandia | EDM Dance Anthem
og.description: Full lyrics to 'Feel Alive' by Agust Islandia. Good vibes only all the time. High-energy EDM celebration of joy and freedom.

twitter.title: Feel Alive Lyrics - Agust Islandia
twitter.description: Full lyrics to the high-energy EDM anthem. 'Love is shining, yours and mine.'

essay: Feel Alive is a joy-forward dance track built around release, movement, and collective energy. Its repetitive hook and upbeat structure make it a Pride-floor anthem designed for participation, not passive listening.
song.lyricsHtml:
Hands up high, we touch the sky
Na-na-na, I feel alive
Na-na-na, love in my life
Good vibes only all the time

Love is shining, yours and mine
Na-na-na, I feel alive
Love is shining in my life
Dancing free, just you and me

Every step, pure energy
Smiles all around, the world's in tune
Every day feels like June
Good vibes only all the time

Love is shining, yours and mine
Na-na-na, I feel alive
Love is shining in my life
Na-na-na, I feel alive

Na-na-na, I feel alive
Na-na-na, I feel alive
Na-na-na, I feel alive
Na-na-na, I feel alive

Na-na-na, I feel alive
Na-na-na, I feel alive
Na-na-na, I feel alive
